---
name: impeccable-design-taste
description: Use this skill when refining web UI, landing pages, marketing assets, or product surfaces to make them feel polished, modern, and intentionally designed.
---

# Impeccable Design Taste

Use this skill to create or improve digital experiences that feel calm, premium, and effortless.

## Core principles
- Prioritize clarity over decoration.
- Keep layouts simple, spacious, and easy to scan.
- Use visual hierarchy so the most important element is immediately obvious.
- Favor restraint: one strong idea per section, not many competing ones.
- Make interactive elements feel obvious, confident, and consistent.
- Ensure accessibility, readability, and responsive behavior are never sacrificed for style.

## Working style
1. Start by identifying the primary message, audience, and desired emotion.
2. Reduce clutter and remove anything that weakens focus.
3. Use typography, spacing, contrast, and color to create a confident visual rhythm.
4. Make buttons, navigation, and calls to action feel intentional and easy to use.
5. Review the result for polish, balance, and consistency across the page.

## Quality checklist
- The page has a clear hero message.
- The layout feels spacious and deliberate.
- Headings and body copy are easy to scan.
- Buttons and links are visually prominent and consistent.
- The design feels cohesive across sections.
- Mobile and desktop experiences remain equally strong.
